content: Self-Refine's iterative, unsupervised self-feedback loop for output refinement can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a two-layer self-improvement framework that outperforms single-perspective iteration. This framework retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision, while resolving the common failure mode of single-perspective self-refinement getting stuck in local suboptimal outputs.
